$comment: Topshot runtime config — reloaded on every run, no restart needed.

judge.$comment: provider: heuristic | openai | gemini | anthropic | openrouter. apiKeyEnv defaults per provider (OPENAI_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY) — put keys in .env. Missing key falls back to heuristic.

loop.$comment: bar: overall score (0.6*mean + 0.4*worst axis) needed to stop early.

zero.$comment: Zero.xyz — capability discovery is free and always on. Paid invocation needs `zero auth login` + funded wallet; set maxPayUsdc > 0 to allow spending.
zero.editQuery: photo image editing crop resize exposure
